name: us500_donchian_trend_m15
hypothesis: US500 M15 Donchian(55) breakouts filtered by ADX>22 and EMA(50)>EMA(200) regime capture index trend-days. Expect PF>=1.6 with trade count >= 250. Falsified if ADX filter fails to improve PF vs unfiltered baseline.

regime_filter.description: Require trending regime AND trade only in direction of higher-TF EMA slope. Excludes ranging bars (~50%).

exits.trailing: chandelier exit: highest(high,22) - 3*ATR(14) for longs; mirror for shorts

notes: Sanity check: if donchian_breaks_raw > 0 but passed_adx == 0 across full IS, ADX threshold is miscomputed.
